rsvp_marketing_hero_tagline: One-stop reservation system. Online booking, flexible pricing, payments, and reminders—all in one place.
rsvp_marketing_feature_booking_descripti: Online reservation with date and time picker, facility and optional service-staff selection. Set how far in advance customers can book and how far ahead.
rsvp_marketing_feature_pricing_descripti: Set default cost per facility. Add pricing rules by day (weekday/weekend) and time range so peak and off-peak rates apply automatically.
rsvp_marketing_feature_payment_descripti: Optional prepay (full or partial). Checkout with Stripe, LINE Pay, customer credit, or cash. Show or hide cost to customers.
rsvp_marketing_feature_notifications_des: Configurable reminder sent before the reservation. Confirmations and status updates keep everyone in sync.
rsvp_marketing_feature_calendar_descript: Week-view calendar for staff. Confirm, mark ready, no-show, or complete. Tags, blacklist, and waitlist supported.
rsvp_marketing_feature_integrations_desc: Reserve with Google and Google Maps. Sync with Google Calendar and Apple Calendar. LINE reservation flow.
rsvp_marketing_feature_policies_descript: Configurable cancel policy (free cancel before X hours). Store and per-facility business hours. Single-slot mode for personal-shop style.
waitlist_marketing_hero_tagline: No extra hardware. Customers scan a QR code, join the queue from their phone, and staff manage everything from the browser.
waitlist_marketing_feature_qr_web_descri: Share a link or QR that opens your store’s waitlist in the browser. Works on any smartphone—no app install required.
waitlist_marketing_feature_party_size_de: Guests enter adults and children so you can plan seating before you call the number.
waitlist_marketing_feature_verification_: Each party gets a display number and a unique 6-digit code. Staff can confirm identity at the host stand.
waitlist_marketing_feature_wait_away_des: Guests don’t need to stand in line. They can browse the menu or step away until you call them.
waitlist_marketing_feature_staff_console: View today’s queue, call the next party, assign a table (facility), or cancel entries—all from store admin.
waitlist_marketing_feature_optional_cont: You can require sign-in or keep the queue open. Optional phone helps reach guests; signed-in users can receive in-app notifications when their table is ready.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_1_title: Scan the store QR or open the link
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_1_descr: Land on the store waitlist page from a QR code or shared URL.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_2_descr: Submit how many adults and children. Add phone if the store uses it for follow-up. Some stores may require sign-in.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_3_descr: See your queue number and 6-digit code. You can place an order while you wait when online ordering is enabled.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_4_descr: If you’re signed in, you may get an in-app notification. Show your code to staff when your number is called.
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_1_descr: Enable waitlist in RSVP settings, then open the Waitlist screen under Reservation.
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_2_descr: Waiting and called parties appear in order with party size, contact info when provided, and pre-order status.
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_3_descr: Tap to mark a party as called. Signed-in customers receive an in-app message when available.
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_4_descr: Assign a facility (table). If a pre-order is linked, the order is tied to that table for the kitchen.
waitlist_marketing_roadmap_body: SMS, LINE, and email alerts when a table is ready; customer self-cancel from the phone; live “how many parties ahead”; tighter checkout linking to waitlist entries. Today’s product focuses on a reliable queue, verification codes, and staff tools.
waitlist_marketing_cta_heading: Turn on cloud waitlist for your store
